# cmccloudv2_postgres_database (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cmccloudv2_postgres_database" "postgres_dbprod" {
    instance_id = "e8d3f389-4008-4b54-a1c1-f4152b73878e"
    name        = "dbmain"
    owner       = "admin"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) Postgres instance id
- `name` (String) Postgres database name

### Optional

- `owner` (String) Postgres username of owner

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
